title: M05 Mastery Check — this Binding
description: Quick applied check. No looking things up. Answer from memory.

questions.prompt: const go = obj.run; go(); — what is this inside go in strict mode?
questions.answer_key: undefined — implicit binding is lost when the method is extracted from the object.

questions.prompt: List the 5 this-binding rules in priority order (highest first).
questions.answer_key: 1. new binding, 2. Explicit binding (call/apply/bind), 3. Implicit binding (obj.method()), 4. Default binding, 5. Arrow (lexical, cannot be overridden)

questions.prompt: fn.bind(obj) calls fn immediately and returns the result.
questions.explanation: bind() returns a new function with this permanently set but does NOT invoke it. call() and apply() invoke immediately.

questions.prompt: Give two ways to pass a class method as a callback while keeping the correct this.
questions.answer_key: 1. this.method.bind(this), 2. () => this.method(), 3. Define as arrow class property: method = () => {}
